content: اِلبوليس سَحَب رُخْصَةَ السِّوَاقَةِ عَلَى شَانِ مَنْتَهِيَّةٍ
translations: eng:The police took away my driving license because it was expired

transcriptions.arabizi: ilboolees sahab ruchsit ilsiwae'a Aalashaen mintihiyya
